text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose anymore. I need a win, and I need it
now!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Hurry up and enter me in another race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
For every time I lose, I need to win at least twice
as much! I have to prove I'm not weak!
choice_data_list: You need time to rest before your next race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to take a break! I can't go on
being a loser like this!
choice_data_list:
You're a strong runner. A few losses can't
change that.

You're a strong runner. A few losses can't
change that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I am strong. No matter how many
times I lose, that won't change.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I lost sight of what's important. I'll make
sure to give my body a proper break.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And then I'll totally clean up in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I know that, but... I don't like feeling like this.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Feeling so weak. It feels terrible. I can't stand
another second of this!
choice_data_list: Then there's only one thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I will. I'll become so strong that no one will be
able to pass me ever again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll reclaim that victory, those cheers, and my
pride with these two legs!
